fields.label: Archangel
fields.value: MIThThRVN, Metatron, the Prince of Countenances

fields.label: Angelic Host
fields.value: ChIVTh HQDSh, Chaioth ha-Qodesh (Holy Living Creatures)

fields.label: Astrological Correspondence
fields.value: RAShITH HGLGIM, Rashith ha-Gilgalim (Beginnings of Turnings or Primum Mobile)

fields.label: Tarot Correspondence
fields.value: the four Aces of the pack

fields.label: Path Text
fields.value: The First Path is called the Admirable or Hidden Intelligence for it is the Light giving the power of comprehension of that First Principle which has no beginning; and it is the Primal Glory, for no created being can attain to its essence.

fields.label: Magical Image
fields.value: The faint outline of a human face looking toward the viewer's right, seen through brilliant light. No details, not even gender, can be made out

fields.label: Additional Title
fields.value: Macroprosopus, the Greater Countenance; Amen; the Primordial Point; the Head Which Is Not

fields.label: Colors
fields.value: in Atziluth--pure brilliance. in Briah--brilliant white. in Yetzirah--brilliant white. in Assiah--white, flecked with gold.

fields.label: Correspondence in the Microcosm
fields.value: Yechidah, the spiritual essence of the self

fields.label: Correspondence in the Body
fields.value: Above the crown of the head

fields.label: Tarot Correspondence
fields.value: The four Twos and four Kings of the pack

fields.label: Path Text
fields.value: The Second Path is called the Illuminating Intelligence; it is the Crown of Creation, the Splendour of Unity, equalling it. It is exalted above every head, and named by Cabalists the Second Glory.

fields.label: Magical Image
fields.value: An old man with a long white beard, wearing a plain grey robe and holding a rough wooden staff. He is facing the viewer's left, and looking slightly upwards

fields.label: Colors
fields.value: in Atziluth--pure soft blue. in Briah--gray. in Yetzirah--iridescent pearl grey. in Assiah--white, flecked with red, blue, and yellow.

fields.label: Correspondence in the Body
fields.value: The left side of the head

fields.label: Tarot Correspondence
fields.value: the four Threes and four Queens of the Pack

fields.label: Path Text
fields.value: The Third Path is the Sanctifying Intelligence, and it is the foundation of Primordial Wisdom; it is called the creator of faith, and its roots are in Amen. It is the parent of faith, and from its virtues faith emanates.

fields.label: Magical Image
fields.value: An old woman with long white hair, wearing a simple black robe, holding a rough wooden staff. She is facing towards the viewer's right.

fields.label: Additional Titles
fields.value: AMA, Ama, the dark sterile mother; AIMA, Aima, the bright fertile mother; MRH, Marah, the Great Sea

fields.label: Colors
fields.value: in Atziluth--crimson. in Briah--black. in Yetzirah--dark brown. in Assiah--gray, fleck with pink.

fields.label: Correspondence in the Body
fields.value: The right side of the head

fields.label: Tarot Correspondence
fields.value: the four Fours of the pack

fields.label: Path Text
fields.value: The Fourth Path is called the Cohesive or Receptive Intelligence, and is so called because it contains all the Holy Powers, and from it emanate all the spiritual virtues with the most exalted essences.  These emanate, one from another, by the power of the Primordial Emanation, the Highest Crown.

fields.label: Magical Image
fields.value: An old but mighty king sitting on a sapphire throne, robed in blue and violet, a golden crown on his head and a scepter and orb in his hands

fields.label: Colors
fields.value: in Atziluth--deep violet. in Briah--blue. in Yetzirah--deep purple. in Assiah--deep azure, flecked with yellow.

fields.label: Negative Power
fields.value: GAaShKLH, Ga'ashekelah, the Breakers in Pieces

fields.label: Name of God
fields.value: ALHIM GBVR, Elohim Gibor (Gods of Power)

fields.label: Tarot Correspondence
fields.value: the four Fives of the pack

fields.label: Path Text
fields.value: The Fifth Path is called the Radical Intelligence because it is itself the essence of Unity, uniting itself to Understanding, which emanates from the primordial depths of Wisdom.

fields.label: Magical Image
fields.value: A warrior queen in full armour, standing in a red chariot pulled by two roan horses, her head bare except for a crown, her dark hair loose, and a drawn sword in her hand.

fields.label: Colors
fields.value: in Atziluth--orange. in Briah--red. in Yetzirah--bright scarlet. in Assiah--red, flecked with black.

fields.label: Name of God
fields.value: YHVH ALVH VDAaTh, Tetragrammaton Eloah va-Daath (Lord God of Knowledge)

fields.label: Tarot Correspondence
fields.value: the four Sixes and four Knights or Princes of the pack

fields.label: Path Text
fields.value: The Sixth Path is called the Mediating Intelligence, because in it are multiplied the influxes of the Emanations, for it causes that influence to flow into all the reservoirs of the blessings, with which these themselves are united.

fields.label: Magical Image
fields.value: A naked child with golden hair, standing with its arms upraised; a king in robes and brown of gold, dark-haired, bearded, seated on a throne, holding a sword in his right hand and a wand topped with a lotus blossom on his left; a naked man crucified on a black leafless tree, tied to the tree at wrists and ankles with bloody ropes

fields.label: Additional Symbol
fields.value: The cube, the cross of six squares, the truncated pyramid

fields.label: Colors
fields.value: in Atziluth--clear rose pink. in Briah--golden yellow. in Yetzirah--rich salmon-pink. in Assiah--golden amber.

fields.label: Name of God
fields.value: YHVH TzBAVTh, Tetragrammaton Tzabaoth (Lord of Armies)

fields.label: Tarot Correspondence
fields.value: The four Sevens of the pack

fields.label: Path Text
fields.value: The Seventh Path is called the Occult Intelligence because it is the refulgent splendour of all the intellectual virtues, which are perceived by the eyes of the intellect and the contemplations of faith.

fields.label: Magical Image
fields.value: A beautiful naked woman. Her hair is long and unbound, and she wears a crown of deep red roses and green leaves; this is her only ornament.

fields.label: Colors
fields.value: In Atziluth — amber. In Briah — emerald. In Yetzirah — bright yellow-green. In Assiah — olive, flecked with gold.

fields.label: Negative Power
fields.value: AaRB TzRQ, A'arab Tzereq (the Ravens of Dispersion)

fields.label: Name of God
fields.value: ALHIM TzBAVTh, Elohim Tzabaoth (Gods of Armies)

fields.label: Angelic Host
fields.value: BNI ALHIM, Beni Elohim (Sons of Elohim)

fields.label: Tarot Correspondence
fields.value: The four Eights of the pack

fields.label: Path Text
fields.value: The Eighth Path is called the Absolute or Perfect Intelligence, because it is the mean of the Primordial; it has no root by which it can cleave or rest except the hidden places of Gedulah, which emanate from its own proper essence.

fields.label: Magical Image
fields.value: A winged hermaphrodite, wearing an orange loincloth and sandals, holding a staff in its right hand and a lantern in its left.

fields.label: Colors
fields.value: In Atziluth — violet purple. In Briah — orange. In Yetzirah — reddish russet. In Assiah — yellowish brown, flecked with white.

fields.label: Name of God
fields.value: ShDI AL ChI, Shaddai El Chai (Almighty Living God)

fields.label: Tarot Correspondence
fields.value: The four Nines of the pack

fields.label: Path Text
fields.value: The Ninth Path is the Pure Intelligence, so called because it purifies the Numerations; it proves and corrects the designing of their representation, and disposes the unity with which they are combined without diminution or division.

fields.label: Magical Image
fields.value: A beautiful and very strong naked man standing upon a cube of stone, his arms raised in the position of Atlas holding up the sky.

fields.label: Colors
fields.value: In Atziluth — indigo. In Briah — violet. In Yetzirah — very dark purple. In Assiah — citrine, flecked with azure.

fields.label: Archangels
fields.value: MThThRVN, Metatron (Prince of Countenances); SNDLPHVN, Sandalphon (Twin Brother)

fields.label: Astrological Correspondence
fields.value: AaVLM YSWDWTh, Olam Yesodoth (Sphere of the Elements)

fields.label: Tarot Correspondence
fields.value: The four Tens and four Pages or Princesses of the pack

fields.label: Path Text
fields.value: The Tenth Path is the Resplendent Intelligence, because it is exalted above every head, and sits on the throne of Binah. It illuminates the splendor of all the Lights, and causes an influence to descend from the Prince of Countenances.

fields.label: Magical Image
fields.value: A young woman in a robe of mixed earth colors, her feet bare and her hair unbound, sitting on a throne of roughly shaped black stone.

fields.label: Additional Symbols
fields.value: The altar, the equal-armed cross, the temple, the Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil.

fields.label: Colors
fields.value: In Atziluth — clear yellow. In Briah — citrine, olive, russet, and black. In Yetzirah — as Briah, but flecked with gold. In Assiah — black rayed with yellow.
